title: There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back
why_this_song: There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back by Shawn Mendes (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

lines: Baby, there's nothing holdin' me back
You take me places that tear up my reputation
Baby, there's nothing holdin' me back
Baby, there's nothing holdin' me back
'Cause if we lost our minds and we took it way too far
I know we'd be alright, I know we would be alright

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Shawn Mendes one question about "There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Shawn Mendes sobre "There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
